headline: Google director exits over military AI deals amid trust erosion
body: A Google director resigned this week citing the company's involvement in Pentagon AI contracts, claiming management abandoned its ethical commitments. The departure signals internal fracture over AI applications in defense and surveillance contexts. For healthcare AI vendors and consultants, this highlights how governance lapses and reputational damage at major platforms affect clinical adoption decisions. Healthcare systems evaluating Google Cloud's healthcare AI tools, EHR integrations, and data analytics now face additional scrutiny around vendor stability and ethical alignment. Trust deficits at foundational AI providers can cascade through the entire healthcare IT ecosystem, influencing procurement and partnership strategies.
